title: Diagram edge context menu with edit, change, and delete options
purpose: Provides a context menu for diagram edges that allows users to edit labels, change origins or destinations, and delete edges.
module_context: Exports a React component EdgeContextMenu that renders a dropdown menu with menu items for editing edge properties and a divider for visual separation. Also exports helper components MenuItem and Divider.

steps.content: Create a reference to the menu DOM element.
Set up a click outside handler to close the menu when clicking elsewhere.
Set up an escape key handler to close the menu when pressing escape.
Define a handler for editing the edge label that prompts the user for input.
Define a handler for changing the edge origin that notifies the parent component.
Define a handler for changing the edge destination that notifies the parent component.
Define a handler for deleting the edge that confirms the action with the user.
Render the menu positioned at the specified coordinates with all menu items.
Prompt the user to enter a new edge label.
IF the user provides a label, pass it to the parent component for updating.
Close the context menu after handling the label edit.
Notify the parent component to enter selection mode for changing the edge origin.
Close the context menu after initiating the origin change.
Notify the parent component to enter selection mode for changing the edge destination.
Close the context menu after initiating the destination change.
Confirm with the user that they want to delete the edge.
IF the user confirms, notify the parent component to delete the edge.
Close the context menu after handling the delete action.
Check if the click occurred outside the menu element.
IF the click was outside, close the context menu.
Listen for escape key presses.
IF the escape key is pressed, close the context menu.
